Sakai Hōitsu

2 works in the gallery.

Chrysanthemums by the Water
by Sakai Hōitsu
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · 1761–1828 · fan painting: ink, color, and gold on paper
Paulownias and Chrysanthemums
by Sakai Hōitsu
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · early 1800s · Two-panel folding screen; ink and color on gilded paper
